description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Release that builds and verifies a Python package release on every push and pull request, but only publishes to PyPI when a tag is pushed. The workflow runs on ubuntu-22.04, sets up Python 3.11, installs and uses build and twine to create and verify a wheel distribution, and uploads it as an artifact. A separate job uploads the artifact to PyPI if the workflow is triggered by a tag push.
